confounders: Month is a categorical field; the dataset does not publish a year or event-time sequence.
Regional cohorts are disjoint within a month but repeated over target months.
Traffic mix, campaign, device, visitor type, and unrecorded operational changes may differ.
No intervention or rollout assignment was observed.
limitations: The probe evaluates retrospective predictive decision quality, not causal product impact.
Target-month clusters, rather than 72 rows, are the uncertainty unit.

controls.model_only: required but not yet run in the offline fixture
controls.naive_base_rate: region-local rate frozen from the first two periods

source.title: Online Shoppers Purchasing Intention Dataset
source.transform: Partition by Region and Month; use February and March as the frozen initial base-rate period; for each later listed month, compare the mean of the prior two resolved regional rates with last-observation persistence and the frozen regional base rate.

title: Does rolling resolved foresight improve later conversion-rate estimates?
